name: Sweet & Sour Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix the first six ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Shape into 1-inch balls and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Bake uncovered for about 15 minutes or until no longer pink in the center.
5. In a separate pan, heat the last four ingredients for the sauce until well combined.
6. 25 minutes before serving, add frozen meatballs to the sauce and simmer for about 20 minutes or until hot.
7. After cooking, transfer the meatballs to a freezer-safe baking sheet and freeze until firm.
8. Once firm, place the meatballs in a zip-lock bag and store in the freezer until ready to serve.
